tags.qa_notes: Depth corrected from 12m to 15m (multiple sources confirm ~15m max). Grey nurse sharks corrected to winter-only. Description updated to clarify restricted access via licensed operator only.

Removed false claim that whale shark tours depart from Lighthouse Bay; they depart from Tantabiddi boat ramp. Turquoise Bay is not 'within easy reach' — it is ~14km south. Depth updated from 8m to 14m (bay max per sources).
Depth updated from 5m to 8m (sources say 5-8m). Removed unsourced claim of '15-20m scuba depth' for deeper bommies. Primarily a snorkel destination; scuba-specific details unsupported.

Removed 'bumphead parrotfish' (not confirmed at this site specifically) and 'cowtail rays' (only rays/stingrays confirmed). Note: requires 250-500m channel swim so entry difficulty is higher than 'Beginner' suggests; difficulty left as Beginner per operator ratings but noted in description.

Removed unsupported claim of manta rays 'seasonally feeding in the current-swept channel' (only mentioned as possible seasonal visitors to reef edge generally). Whale shark tour departure confirmed as Tantabiddi boat ramp. Marine life updated to confirmed species only.

Depth corrected from 10m to 5m (sources confirm 1-5m). Removed unconfirmed species: 'wobbegong sharks' and 'thick-lipped wrasse' not confirmed at Lakeside specifically. Removed overstated 'almost guaranteed' turtle claim.

Coordinates corrected from (-22.7, 113.6667) to (-21.8008, 114.1237) per PADI dive site data — previous coords were ~100km too far south. Removed 'grey nurse sharks' (only confirmed at Navy Pier in winter, not at Blizzard Ridge). Marine life updated to confirmed species.

CRITICAL: Clerke Reef is NOT in Ningaloo Marine Park. It is part of Rowley Shoals Marine Park, located at approximately -17.3S, 119.35E — roughly 300km west of Broome. Current coordinates (-22.65, 113.7333) are fictional. The site is liveaboard-only from Broome, season September-December. This record must be removed from ningaloo-reef or reassigned to a Rowley Shoals destination. Validated downgraded to false.

Removed 'hammerhead sharks' — mentioned for Ningaloo generally but not confirmed at Mandu Wall specifically. Site-specific sources for Mandu Wall are limited; description updated to reflect this. Wall type confirmed.

Marine life confirmed: turtle cleaning station, leopard sharks, dugongs, pufferfish, porcupinefish, crayfish, octopus, seasonal whale sharks and humpbacks. Whale shark season correctly noted as March-July. Humpback season approximately June-October.

Site confirmed as real location on Ningaloo Station with historical whaling station and three offshore wrecks (SS Fin, The Zvir, SS Perth). However, no dive operator tours or site-specific marine life reports found. Marine life claims removed. Site may be better classified as wreck dive. Validated kept true for location but description is largely unverified.

Depth corrected from 4m to 3m (sources confirm 1-3m). Removed false claim of 'loggerhead turtles' (only 'turtles' confirmed). Removed false claim of 'entry directly off the beach' — actual entry is over a rocky ledge at high tide only (min 1.2m tide required). Removed 'south of Coral Bay' location error — site is in Cape Range NP, ~65km south of Exmouth and north of Coral Bay.
